instructions.text: Listen to 3 sentences, tap the most important words
instructions.audio: Listen carefully and tap only the keywords

sentences.audio: The Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean on Earth
sentences.text: The Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean on Earth

sentences.audio: Photosynthesis uses sunlight to create energy for plants
sentences.text: Photosynthesis uses sunlight to create energy for plants

sentences.audio: The Amazon rainforest produces twenty percent of the world's oxygen
sentences.text: The Amazon rainforest produces 20% of the world's oxygen

good.message: Good work! Just missed a couple

tryAgain.message: Listen again for: who/what + action + facts
